name: Chamber of Commerce and Industry of Serbia (PKS)

outreach.notes: Institutional partner of EXPO 2027 d.o.o. (signed agreement, official news 2025-06-25): co-designs the Expo BUSINESS PROGRAM, recruits domestic + international companies into the CORPORATE PARTICIPANTS ZONE and BEST PRACTICE ZONE, organizes business forums + a Global Business Summit. THE gatekeeper for corporate-area booths (~45 pavilions). Source (A): expobelgrade2027.org/en/news/agreement-on-institutional-partnership-...
